name: Michael Palin in Nigeria
overview: In his first visit to Nigeria, labelled the ‘Giant of Africa’, Michael Palin embarks on an epic 1,300-mile journey. It’s a country that encompasses stunning landscapes and wildlife, a variety of cultures and faiths, and a diverse population who speak over 500 languages

trailers.title: Michael Palin on Michael Palin in Nigeria | BFI Q&A
